title: Roundup Path Weedkiller, Ready to Use, Refill for Pressure Sprayer, 5 Litre
features: Systemic weed killer, killing the root so weeds do not come back
Fast Action, results visible in 1-2 days
Ideal for killing weeds on paths, patios and drives
Degraded into soil by micro organisms
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Ideal for weeds on paths, patios and drives While some weedkillers may stain, this formula will protect stonework while taking care of weeds. Kills right to the roots Travels through the leaves straight to the root to prevent weeds from growing back or regenerating. Results in 48 hours Our fast acting formula means visible results in just 48 hours, working right in front of your eyes! Degrades naturally in soil to allow replanting Degrades naturally in soil leaving no residue, meaning you can start replanting in just 7 days. Next page 1 For Paths & Drives 2 Kills To The Root 3 Results in 48 hours 4 Replant In 7 Days Simply and easily tackle weeds on your path, patio or driveway Designed specifically to kill weeds to the root – clears from paths, driveways and patios, where it can be particularly difficult to remove weeds with their full root system. Starts working immediately, with visible results in 48 hours. The glyphosate formula degrades naturally in soil, naturally broken down after 7 days by micro-organisms. No more hand-weeding for those hard to reach roots. Why should I use ROUNDUP Fast Action Path & Drive Ready To Use Weedkiller? ROUNDUP Fast Action Path & Drive Ready To Use Weedkiller is absorbed by leaves and moves through the entire plant, above and below ground, to destroy weeds growing through all hard surfaces including drives, patios, paths, tarmac, gravel and paving. Where can I use ROUNDUP Fast Action Path & Drive Ready To Use Weedkiller? Controls most weeds on paths, drives, patios, paving and gravel areas. Do not treat near drains, wells or water courses and avoid run-off. Do not use on lawns or other wanted plants unless you want to kill them. When should I use ROUNDUP Fast Action Path & Drive Ready To Use Weedkiller? Spray any time when weeds are actively growing and have adequate leaf area to absorb spray. Treat established perennial weeds at the start of flowering to give best results. Apply in calm, dry conditions and avoid drift into cultivated plants. How do I use ROUNDUP Fast Action Path & Drive Ready To Use Weedkiller? Apply spray evenly to wet the leaves of the weeds, avoiding run-off. Leave weeds 7 days before digging or soil cultivation, for the weedkiller to move to the roots. Repeat application may be necessary, should new growth occur. Is ROUNDUP Fast Action Path & Drive Ready To Use Weedkiller safe to use on areas used by children and pets? Keep children and pets away from treated areas until spray has dried. Keep out of the reach of children.
